We chose PostgreSQL over MySQL because of its better JSON support and full-text search capabilities.
The team decided to use gRPC instead of REST for internal service communication due to performance requirements.
We selected Kubernetes for container orchestration after evaluating Docker Swarm and Nomad.
Authentication is handled by Auth0. We considered building our own but decided the maintenance burden was too high.
The CI/CD pipeline runs on GitHub Actions. We migrated from Jenkins in December 2025.
For monitoring, we use Grafana dashboards backed by Prometheus metrics and Loki for log aggregation.
We adopted the trunk-based development model. All feature branches must be merged within 48 hours.
The API versioning strategy uses URL path prefixes (e.g., /v1/, /v2/).
